title: Metal Ammo Box
description: Changes metal ammo box (and creative variant) from Create Big Cannons to be gray colored
body:
Changes metal ammo box (and creative variant) from Create Big Cannons to be gray colored.
Also changes heavy autocannon ammo box from CBC:AT.


Pairs good with my other texture pack [Create Military Grade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-military-grade)

Feel free to contact my Discord: blackeagleyt
Also my YouTube if needed: www.youtube.com/@BlackeagleYT64
